posts.author: Arjun_Gupta1
posts.community: KDDL (Ethos Watches) - Scalable business model at an inflection point?
posts.text: My views on ethos as a long term investment: I currently hold only ethos in my portfolio. I view it as a wonderful business acquired at a good price of ~2400. I am expecting solid growth in revenue and pat for the reasons that there is a bar for Swiss manufacturers like Rolex etc. to open retail stores in India and start D2C. This is contained in the Single brand retailing rules for India. Therefore for atleast a decade I see no Swiss manufacturer starting D2C in India. This shows us that the competition is only amongst Indian retailers of which ethos is the largest. Watches are never going to…
